328b7(1): bar bri// dbusu gru gsum gang gnod bri// 'khrul mig bcu drug rtsa ba'i sngags// yang logs bcu pa'i spu gri rtsibs// las kyi sna tshogs rtsa ba gcig zla khams me tog srung ba'i 'bru// bcu bzhi bskor la skabs dang sbyar// khrab dang / 
329a1(1): drug chu tsha ba sku// thod pa gdong bcas sbyar ba rtsam// zhag bdun sngags bzlas drag tu bskul// lha sgom bka' rten 'og tu gnam// sngags kyi rtsa ba gnyis bya// bcu drug bcu gnyis rno dang shis// rig pa stobs dang 
329a2(1): brda' yis sbyar// drag sngags sbyor ba 'di lta ste// e ka he dun yaM maM ra shaM dzAM mun dri shi ri krang shu/ sarba du raM u nan gzer phyung sbur nan srog la myogs rbed/ drag sngags sngon du phyung ba'i rgyud las/ yan lag gi sbyor ba'i le'u ste nyi shu
329a3(1): pa'o// / de nas yang bac+doMs kyis drag sngags yongasu smin pa'i don 'di gsungaso// e ma chos sku byang chub sems// skye 'gags med pa'i ngor gnas// ma bcos bde chen lhun gyis grug/ yas thig ler ngang la rdzogs 
329a4(1): thabs kyi rgyal po rdo rje yis// gsang ba yongasu rdzogs pa yi// drag po sngags kyi rmod pa gdams// kun tu bskyod pa gsum gyis sbyangs// bde lam can gzhan las min// yis rig pa snang bar sbyang // rgyud kyi rgyal po mngon byung ba'i/ 
329a5(1): ma 'ongs dam can srang byed na// de yang dam las yel srung // 'chi bdag dreg pa stobs can kun// dam tshig bka' yi 'khor lo srung // e ma ho// rig pa'i bka' rgyud 'di// dge ba'i las can dag pa dang // mi sgribs lam la gnas pa dang 
329a6(1): 'chi bdag tshegs kyi dge 'dun kun// rig pa'i lam la zhugs pa dang // 'chi bdag dreg pa myos pa dang // 'joms pa'i tshogs dang khrag skyugs tshegs// phud byed mngags pa bdug pa'i tshegs// 'khor na gnas pa'i dam can kum/ 
329a7(1): sad+yas bka' yi rgyud 'di gzung // gnyis med 'gro ba'i sa la gnas// rdo gtun po rdo'i tshogs// rdo khro bo rdo khrag 'thung dang // rdo gnod sbyin srin po dang // rdo mkha' 'gro tshogs rnams kyang // dam la gnas shing mi g.yel srung // sa ng+yas
329b1(1): bka' yi yon tan rjod mi lang // che ba'i yon tan gsum dang gcig ca ldan// khro bo'i snying po drag po ma mo drag po dang // bcud gsum sgril rin chen phreng ba ltar// dam par sbyar la gnyen po gcig tu bsgrub// dbang bsdud phyag rgya chen po rang 
329b2(1): gzir// namakha' rin chen rgya mtsho me dang 'dra// dreg pa stobs chen phyag rgya brtan byas la// snying po bcu gnyis rtsa ba gcig tu dril// yan lag gang 'dod spu gri thams// gong rung sbyar na rin chen snying po 'grub// bstan pa gsum ldan bde 
329b3(1): ba gcig gi dang // snying po bcu gnyis mi 'gyur thig le la// bsrung ba'i rgyal po dmar len mtshan dang sbyar// gzir ba'i snying po gang yin 'tsham su 'pho// rnam shes 'phrog pa 'bru gcig snying la spu// mtshon dpag bka' na skye 
329b4(1): med na mkha' 'brog/ shes la rgyang ring sbyor ba'i tshad dang ldan// 'bru brgyad rtsa ba gang dmigs spu gri lnga ni// 'dod pa'i don bzhi snying po bcad nas dbrog nye la gnod byed mtshon cha rang gcod// man ngag ldan pas bde bar spyad ni rma/ 
329b5(1): rang sems stobs ldan rig pa'i rtsal// 'ching med grol bar thar pa'i lam mchog 'bras// de med rang 'chi mnar mengs las ring // thabs med sbyong bral ldan med bgrod ma thob/ rtsa ba re dang yan lag brdar mi sbyor// sun byin grol 
329b6(1): med 'ching ba'i gnas las bgrod// blo yengs che ba'i yon tan bsam mi lang // grol ba'i phyag rgya yang dag 'phags lam ldan// 'di de bde dang ston par byed pa'i mchog/ k+Sh+m+R+YuM s+yA kyo b+hU som+b+ha ri/ ma ra ba laM nA d+ha pi nA~M ga de bar ga sham 
329b7(1): s+ya ma ka yi bde ba'i klong // a dang khyab tse sU b+hU ta// yes rig pa'i klong du brdal/ 'di dag bde ba'i lam can de// smin cing bgrod pa'i thebs mchog rgyal// a ye ye shes las byung ba// skye mong rnamami dag chos skur gsal// e yi yis las byung ba// drag 
330a1(1): bsreg byed num mkha' gas pa// sangs rgyas skye ba man 'phrul lo// bde ba'i lam can snying po// lus 'das// nor bu gser ldan rin chen rgya las rol 
330a2(1): bka' yi bden pa bde ba'i ngang la bzhag/ ces bcom ldan 'das kyis gsungs pa la 'khor rnams rjes yi rang ste mngon par ba stong / 'khor de dag gis bden pa 
330a3(1): mthong bar gyur to// drag sngags sngor du byung ba'i rgyud las/ rgyud yongs su gtang ba'i le'u gyi nyi shu gcog pa'o// dpalag shin rje'i rgyad khri drug stong 
330a4(1): nas/ drag po rno dpal mtshon cha'i skabs bton pa'o// snying po man ngag gi rgyud rdzogs so// sarbam da'o// bkra shi
